name: Flora
description: A field of clovers, buds and pinwheel blooms — all cut from the same 240-point cloth, so every redraw morphs one flower species into another.

code.style: /* clover/bud/hypocycloid all share a 240-point outline, so clip-path interpolates between species */ --bloom: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --species: @p(@shape(clover 3), @shape(clover 5), @shape(bud 4), @shape(bud 6), @shape(hypocycloid 5)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--bloom); clip-path: var(--species); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)) scale(@rand(0.65, 1.08)); } transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
